title: Ghaghar Burhi temple
tagline: Ghaghar Burhi temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Ghaghar Buri (Bengali: ঘাঘর বুড়ি), is a small shrine dedicated to Goddess Kali Mata.
overview.description: Ghaghar Buri (Bengali: ঘাঘর বুড়ি), is a small shrine dedicated to Goddess Kali Mata. It is located in Asansol city, by the side of the National Highway (Bypass) in West Bengal, India. It is the oldest temple of Asansol. A country fair is held in this Temple on 15 January every year.

topPlaces.name: Asansol
topPlaces.description: Asansol is a city in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is the second largest city in West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Kalla, Asansol
topPlaces.description: Kalla is a neighbourhood in Asansol of Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Asansol Polytechnic
topPlaces.description: Asansol Polytechnic, established in 1950, is a government technical college located in Asansol, Paschim Bardhaman district, West Bengal. This polytechnic college is affiliated with the West Bengal State Council of Technical and Vocational Education and Skill Development, and is recognized by the AICTE, New Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Railpar, Asansol
topPlaces.description: Railpar is a neighbourhood in Asansol of Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is governed by Asansol Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Chapui
topPlaces.description: Chapui is a census town in the Raniganj CD block in the Asansol Sadar subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Asansol
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Asansol (Latin: Asansolen(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Asansol in the ecclesiastical province of Calcutta in India.

topPlaces.name: Electric Loco Shed, Asansol
topPlaces.description: Electric Loco Shed, Asansol is a motive power depot performing locomotive maintenance and repair facility for electric locomotives of the Indian Railways, located at Asansol of the Eastern Railway zone in West Bengal, India. It is one of the two electric locomotive sheds of the Eastern Railway, the others being at Howrah (HWH).

topPlaces.name: Sripur Area
topPlaces.description: Sripur Area is one of the 14 operational areas of Eastern Coalfields Limited located in Asansol subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district in the state of West Bengal, India.

This polytechnic college is affiliated with the West Bengal State Council of Technical and Vocational Education and Skill Development, and is recognized by the AICTE, New Delhi.

The Roman Catholic Diocese of Asansol (Latin: Asansolen(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Asansol in the ecclesiastical province of Calcutta in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ghaghar Burhi temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ghaghar Burhi temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ghaghar Burhi temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (177 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ghaghar Burhi temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ghaghar Burhi temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ghaghar Burhi temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ghaghar Burhi temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ghaghar Burhi temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Asansol, Kalla, Asansol, Asansol Polytechnic, Railpar, Asansol, Chapui.
